title: Browser-use Testing and Documentation Agent
job:
1. Run `browser-use --help` in the my-agent folder and capture the output to see available commands.

2. Read the contents of `main.py` in the my-agent folder to understand how browser-use is configured and used.

3. Create a simple test using browser-use. For example, test it by having it navigate to a website (like google.com) and perform a simple action (like searching for "test").

4. Save all outputs (help output, main.py contents, and test results) to a file named `browser-use-test-results.md` in the root directory.

5. Commit this file with the message "test: Browser-use testing and exploration".
